emails.subject: Re: 509018 and 508957
emails.body: Re: 509018 and 508957 These deals were entered to flatten out the traders' positions in the PX. You shouldn't see the index being used on any deals past tomorrow (the exchange closes effective Feb. 1), but Bob Badeer and Matt Motley both had positions they needed to back out of. They turned around and bought the same amount at the Dow Jones index. Hope this helps! Kate From: Sharen Cason 01/30/2001 04:15 PM

emails.subject: Re: 509018 and 508957
emails.body: I believe Melissa had talked to you about checking once again to see if these deals should be against the PX index. It is our understanding that we are going to have to move everything that is against that index to another index at some point. Thanks! Forwarded by Sharen Cason/HOU/ECT on 02/02/2001 10:04 AM Kate Symes 01/30/2001 06:27 PM
